title: Verstappen to compete in 'bucket list' 24-hour race
summary: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Max Verstappen will tick off one of his "bucket list" events when he drives in May's Nurburgring 24-Hours endurance race.

summary: The Chequered Flag podcast's Jennie Gow and Marc Priestly discuss how new F1 regulations will entice "casual fans" with more "drama" on the tracks.

title: Mercedes 'hit ground running' with new F1 car regulations
summary: On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, former McLaren mechanic Marc Priestly credits Mercedes for the way they have managed to "hit the ground running" on integrating new F1 car regulations.

title: Brit rookie Lindblad 'living his dream' on F1 debut
summary: Racing Bulls' rookie Arvid Lindblad says he "showed people a bit of what I am here to do" after finishing eighth on his F1 debut at the Australian Grand Prix.

title: Was new-era F1 really racing or more like a computer game?
summary: The opening race of F1's new era in Australia left the drivers with mixed feelings about what the sport had become, writes Andrew Benson.

summary: Cadillac's long journey to the Formula 1 grid is finally complete, now the real work starts – but from a good foundation.

title: No regrets from Ferrari drivers after staying out during VSC
summary: It looked as if Ferrari might have thrown away a win when it didn't pit during a VSC, but its drivers say Mercedes were always going to be tough to catch in the Australian Grand Prix.

summary: BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Australian Grand Prix.

summary: All the key BBC coverage details for round two of the Formula 1 season at the Chinese Grand Prix in Shanghai, which takes place from 13-15 March.

title: Russell ‘lucky’ to not be worse off after poor start in the Australian GP
summary: George Russell had no battery and fell behind at the start of the Australian Grand Prix, but he was able to recover.

title: Piastri caught out by unexpected power in pre-race crash
summary: While Oscar Piastri took a significant portion of the blame for the crash that ruled him out of his home race, he said a surge of power from his car's new power unit also played a part.

title: Russell wins first race of new F1 era in Australia
summary: George Russell takes a comfortable victory in the Australian Grand Prix at the start of a new F1 era after an early scrap with Charles Leclerc.

summary: George Russell led a Mercedes one-two finish in the first grand prix of the season as Ferrari followed the Silver Arrows home.

title: Driver dissent surges after power unit struggles in Australian GP qualifying
summary: Drivers are down – and not just on power – after sampling the latest breed of F1 cars in qualifying for the first time.

title: Stroll permitted to start Australian Grand Prix despite not meeting 107% rule
summary: Despite not setting a fast enough lap time to meet the 107% rule all weekend, Lance Stroll has been granted permission to race in the Australian Grand Prix.

title: Russell surprised by how much rivals showed in testing after dominating Melbourne qualifying
summary: While many expect teams to keep their cards close to their chest in testing, George Russell is surprised that Mercedes' rivals seemingly showed their hands before the first race of the season.
